learned: Communication — saying things honestly, even when it's hard.
Patience — letting things grow at their own pace.
Growth — becoming better people alongside each other.
letter: Two years is a long time to keep choosing the same person, and somehow it has felt natural. We've learned, grown, and stayed. Thank you for the patience, the honesty, and the quiet days that meant the most. Here's to everything we've built and everything still ahead.
